---
title: "About"
about:
  template: solana
  image: images/profile_pic_akg.jpg
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
---

```{=html}
  <style>
body {
  background-image: url('images/background-pic.jpeg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}

  </style>
```

::: {#hero-heading}
**Abdelkarim el Ghani** is a Research Assistant at the [**Erasmus University Rotterdam**](https://www.eur.nl/){target="_blank"}. His expertise lies in:

-   Statistical data analysis

-   Neuroscience

-   Open science practices

He is highly skilled in [**R**](https://www.r-project.org/){target="_blank"} programming, data visualization, and managing large-scale research datasets.

Abdelkarim has extensive experience in both academic and clinical research environments. He has:

-   Contributed to international conferences

-   Authored scientific publications

-   Supported open science initiatives by sharing code and workflows on platforms like the Open Science Framework ([**OSF**](https://osf.io/){target="\"_blank"}).

His research interests include:

-   Neurodevelopment

-   Brain imaging

-   Statistical modeling of behavioral data

Driven by a passion for data-driven problem-solving, Abdelkarim aims to advance reproducible and transparent scientific research.
:::

<a href="https://www.pexels.com/photo/white-painted-wall-1939485/" target="_blank" class="small-link">Photo by Henry & Co.</a>
